zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Loudham於1360年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親John Loudham II46歲，母親Isabel Breton36歲。她於1387年與Thomas Foljambe在英國英格蘭德比夏爾沃爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1403年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Loudham于1360年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾时，她的父亲John Loudham II46岁，母亲Isabel Breton36岁。她于1387年与Thomas Foljambe在英国英格兰德比夏爾沃爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1403年在英国英格兰越可爾享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Loudham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Loudham was born in 1360, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Loudham II, was 46 and her mother, Isabel Breton, was 36. She married Thomas Foljambe in 1387, in Walton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1403, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Loudham est née en 1360, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Loudham II, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Isabel Breton, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Foljambe en 1387, à Walton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1403, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Loudham 1360 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Loudham II 46 und ihre Mutter Isabel Breton 36. Sie hat 1387 in Walton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Foljambe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1403 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Loudham è nata il nel 1360 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Loudham II, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Isabel Breton, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Foljambe nel 1387, nel Walton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1403, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Loudhamが1360年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Loudham IIは46歳，母Isabel Bretonは36歳であった。1387年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアワルトンでThomas Foljambeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1403年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Loudham(이)가 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Loudham II(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Breton(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 월턴에서 Thomas Foljambe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에 묻혔다.

Ela faleceu em 1403, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Loudham родилась в 1360 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Loudham II было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Breton, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Foljambe в 1387 г. в местности валтон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1403 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
